title: IP7 5RW, Brett Aggregates Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/AP3832LE/S005
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:    Operator name: Brett Aggregates Limited   Installation name: Layham Quarry Landfill   Permit number: EPR/AP3832LE/S005   "
